entries.name: static
entries.documentation: Marks a declaration with static storage semantics.

entries.name: inout
entries.documentation: Marks a parameter as both input and output.

entries.name: uniform
entries.documentation: Marks a parameter or variable as uniform.

entries.name: volatile
entries.documentation: Prevents certain compiler optimizations on a value.

entries.name: precise
entries.documentation: Requests precise evaluation without value-changing optimization.

entries.name: nointerpolation
entries.documentation: Disables interpolation for a varying value.

entries.name: linear
entries.documentation: Uses linear interpolation for a varying value.

entries.name: centroid
entries.documentation: Samples an interpolated value at the centroid.

entries.name: sample
entries.documentation: Samples an interpolated value at the pixel sample position.

entries.name: else
entries.documentation: Fallback branch for a conditional statement.

entries.name: default
entries.documentation: Fallback branch for a switch statement.

entries.name: do
entries.documentation: Loop statement that executes before checking its condition.

entries.name: break
entries.documentation: Breaks out of the nearest loop or switch.

entries.name: continue
entries.documentation: Continues to the next loop iteration.

entries.name: default
entries.documentation: Fallback branch for a switch statement.
